productDisplayName: Allen Solly Woman Check Brown Shirt
description: Style Note Give your casual summer wardrobe a stylish spin with this top from allen solly. Team it with denim jeans and slip-ons for a casual look or with a pencil skirt and jacket for a semi-formal look. Product Details Shirt with brown checks, mandarin collar, placket with brown buttons and overlocked frills, princess panels with top stitch, short sleeves with narrow pleated buttoned cuff, back yoke on bias, curved hem Material and Care 93% cotton and 7% polyester Machine wash with like colours Do not bleach Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
